title: Founding Foundation
content:
Founding Foundation

Corporate - Our Founding Foundation

TARHAN-IDER FOUNDATION

was established in Ankara in 1997 under the name

"Ide Foundation

" (Foundation for the Protection of Human Values and Social Solidarity), and the name of the foundation was changed to

"İDER

" (Foundation for Human Values and Mental Health) in the deed amendment made on July 24, 2002 and its headquarters was moved from Ankara to Istanbul. On October 5, 2021, the name of the foundation was changed to

TARHAN-IDER FOUNDATION (Nevzat Nermin Tarhan Foundation for Human Values and Mental Health)

.

For Detailed Information:

www.tarhan.org.
